Data Readiness

📝
Please select an employee from Home to start the competency assessment.
ℹ️
Calibration reminder — Score 3 means the employee fully meets the expectation of their current group (A/B/C). Score 4 requires measurable business impact. Score 5 requires evidence the employee performs close to the next group level, coaches others, or sets standards. Evidence / reason is mandatory whenever a score of 1, 2, 4 or 5 is selected.

Development Plan Summary

A consolidated view of self-identified and manager-assigned development actions across all competencies.

Review & Submit

Use the buttons in the bottom action bar to save a draft, submit, save manager review, or finalize this assessment.
📊
Please select an employee from Home to view dashboard.

Assessment Result Dashboard

Standard Calibration — Expected Level 3

How Self and Manager scores compare to the fixed Standard Expected Level (Score 3 = meets current grade/group expectation).

Standard vs Self vs Manager — Radar Profile

Competency-by-competency comparison across the employee's function. The Standard line is flat at 3.

Heatmap — Competency Strength & Weakness

Colour bands: red 1–2 (gap) · amber 3 (meets expectation) · green 4–5 (above / outstanding).
1 — Far Below 2 — Below 3 — Meeting 4 — Above 5 — Outstanding Not yet scored

Top Strengths & Top Development Areas

🔒
Admin Mode is locked. Switch to Admin mode (top right) and enter the passcode to manage master data and saved assessments.

Upload Master Data (Excel)

Upload a workbook containing sheets for Employee Master, BARS Dictionary, Function Weight, and (optionally) an Assessment Template. Column headers should match the original Vilube workbook.
📤

Click to choose a file or drag an .xlsx here

Expected sheets: Employee Master · BARS Dictionary · Function Weight · Assessment Template (optional)
Currently active master data: Embedded Vilube 2026 workbook

Employee Master

Read from master data. Manager is inferred (highest grade peer within the same Function; escalates to Supply Chain Director where no senior exists in-function) unless manually overridden below.

User Management

Login accounts, roles, and password status derived from the Employee Master and login activity.

Function Weight

Weights define how each competency contributes to the final weighted score. Each function's weights must total 100%.

BARS Dictionary

Behaviourally Anchored Rating Scale definitions — read only. Update via master data upload to change wording.

All Saved Assessments

Every assessment record stored in this browser's local storage, across all cycles.

Data Quality & Validation

Automated checks run against the active master data set.

Audit Log

Login, logout, password changes, and assessment workflow actions across all users in this browser.
